title: Artificial Fern Green Plant Bird's-nest Fern Asplenium Nidus Faux Silk Tropical Plants for Outdoor Wall Decor, 17 inches (Green 2 Pcs)
features: This artificial green plant is made of silk and iron. 17 inch height , 9 branch and leaves.
Realistic Greenery: Faux fern plant with lush, verdant fronds for a natural look.
Artificial plant requires no watering or sunlight, perfect for busy lifestyles. They will easy to help your home more beautiful.
Outdoor Decor: Ideal for enhancing outdoor spaces like patios, porches, and gardens. Wall-Mounted: Designed for wall decoration, adding a tropical vibe to any room.
description: Bring the lush beauty of nature indoors with this artificial fern green plant. Bird's-nest Fern (Asplenium nidus), this faux tropical plant is perfect for outdoor wall decoration or as a low-maintenance addition to your indoor greenery. With its vibrant green hues and intricate frond patterns, this artificial fern will add a touch of natural elegance to any space. Measuring approximately 17 in diameter, this compact plant is easy to incorporate into your decor without overwhelming the area. Whether you're looking to create a verdant oasis on your patio or simply want to enjoy the beauty of nature without the hassle of watering and pruning, this artificial fern green plant is an excellent choice.
